title: File State Tax Returns
description: File the deceased\
overview: Most states with income tax require a final state return in addition to the federal return. Some states also require a separate estate income tax or inheritance tax return. Deadlines and forms vary by state.
steps: Determine if your state has a personal income tax (exceptions: TX
NH)
File the deceased\'s final state income tax return using your state\'s standard form
Write "DECEASED" and date of death on the return
Check if your state requires a fiduciary income tax return for the estate
Check if your state has an estate tax or inheritance tax (12 states + DC have estate tax; 6 states have inheritance tax)
File any required state estate or inheritance tax returns by the deadline
